author: a13k5
title: Playlist bugging after pausing playback
content:
When starting playback from local files, and pause mid-playback and then resume, the next song won’t play. 

Checking the playlist and then clicking on a random song, the player scrolls through all the files in a buggy manor.
I then have to restart the playback by restarting the app.

author: Aurora OB
title: God
content: Nice musicplayer for offline files but missing widgets

author: BMXJergen
title: Ad's with time makes it only 1 star
content: Have to wait to start listen to my own music.. its okey with ads i can x out, but when they got a timer i will delete the app...

author: Roberto018
title: Worse audio quality
content:
It's great that this app is so simple to use, has built-in EQ and a handful of neat features, but...
Compared to Apple's native music app, the audio quality leaves much to be desired. FLAC files should not sound worse than 192kbps, and I would really like a clarification as to why this is.

author: Trond Kjetil
title: Very good flac player
content: The first usable flac player for ios that I have found
